report_title: Broey Current Release Platform Links Draft
scope_note: Links-only research foundation for current public Broey website release pages. This report intentionally excludes credits, ISRCs, UPCs, labels/distributors, BPM/key, publishing, writers, producers, mixing, mastering, and legal metadata.

confidence_definitions.High: Direct platform release/track/video URL found via official platform page, official artist page, official Linktree, official smart link, official Bandcamp, or official YouTube/Topic result.
confidence_definitions.Medium: Likely official but derived from a platform ID, regional storefront, official hub, or needs manual open/check before publishing.
confidence_definitions.Low: Not found, wrong match, possible conflict, or should not be added without manual verification.

releases.title: FREE

links.source_how_found: Spotify search result/page title: FREE - Single by Broey.; Official Linktree lists FREE as a 2026 Broey. single.
links.notes: Direct Spotify album/single URL. This is also the URL that was previously used on the site for dancing dumpster fire; it appears to belong to FREE, not dancing dumpster fire.

links.source_how_found: Apple Music artist page lists FREE - Single as latest release; direct album URL was carried from prior draft research but search exposed only artist-page listing.
links.notes: Likely direct Apple release URL. Manually open in Apple Music before publishing because current web search did not expose the direct album page.

links.source_how_found: YouTube search result: official platform upload / Topic-style result for FREE by Broey.

links.notes: Needs manual open/check in YouTube Music.

links.notes: Do not add until manually found.

links.source_how_found: Official Broey. Bandcamp search/list did not surface FREE.
links.notes: Do not add unless the artist confirms a Bandcamp page exists.

links.notes: Needs manual open/check. Add only after confirming the Amazon Music album page resolves.

links.notes: Do not add until manually found.

links.notes: Do not add until manually found.

links.source_how_found: No confident Beatport result found.

links.source_how_found: Official Linktree lists FREE, but the fetch did not expose a clean direct smart-link URL.

important_review_checks: Confirm the title exactly matches the website release title.
Confirm artist display includes Broey / Broey. or the correct collaborator.
Confirm the URL is the release page or official platform track/video page, not a playlist, artist profile, fan upload, or random repost.
Confirm whether Spotify URL is an album/single release URL or a track URL.
Confirm whether YouTube is an official Topic upload, official Broey/channel upload, official label upload, or unofficial upload.
Flag storefront/regional URL differences before publishing if the website prefers US/global canonical links.
conflicts_duplicates_ambiguous_links: The Spotify URL https://open.spotify.com/album/5bLOPMvddqpng76Lj5ZRKt appears to be FREE, not dancing dumpster fire. Move it to FREE and do not use it on the dancing dumpster fire page.
